childhood.familyBackground: Marc Jeffrey Rowan is an American billionaire businessman who is the chief executive officer (CEO) of Apollo Global Management.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 마크 제프리 로완(Marc Jeffrey Rowan)은 미국의 억만장자 사업가로 아폴로 글로벌 매니지먼트(Apollo Global Management)의 최고경영자(CEO)이다.
childhood.education: Details of Marc Rowan's education are not widely documented in public sources.
childhood.educationKo: Marc Rowan의 교육 세부사항은 공개 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.earlyLife: Marc Rowan built a career in Private equity.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Marc Rowan은(는) Private equity 분야에서 경력을 쌓음.

careerTimeline.event: Established presence in finance & investments industry
Became a major figure in Private equity
careerTimeline.eventKo: Private equity 분야의 주요 인물로 부상

failures.description: COVID-19 pandemic impacted business operations globally
failures.descriptionKo: 코로나19 팬데믹이 전 세계적으로 사업 운영에 영향
failures.lesson: Resilience and adaptability are essential in times of crisis

personalTraits.knownFor: Building wealth through Private equity. Net worth $6.9B.
personalTraits.knownForKo: Private equity을(를) 통해 부를 축적. 순자산 10조원.
